user.title: Discover Blauberg Freshpoint units
user.description: Search for Freshpoint units on the local network. Use 255.255.255.255 unless your network requires a subnet broadcast address such as 192.168.1.255.

select.title: Select Freshpoint units
select.description: Choose the discovered Freshpoint units to add.

manual.title: Add Blauberg Freshpoint manually
manual.description: Enter the Freshpoint IP address and 16-character controller ID.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Freshpoint unit.
error.cannot_discover: Could not send the discovery request.
error.no_devices_found: No new Freshpoint units were discovered.
error.no_devices_selected: Select at least one Freshpoint unit.

abort.already_configured: This Freshpoint unit is already configured.
